name: Grilled Lime Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken breasts to flatten them.
2. In a resealable plastic bag, combine lime juice, olive oil, chopped green onions, minced garlic, 2 tablespoons fresh dill, and pepper.
3. Add the chicken; seal the bag, refrigerate for 2 to 4 hours.
4. Drain the marinade and discard it before grilling.
5. Grill the chicken uncovered over medium-hot coals for 12 to 15 minutes, until tender and juices run clear.
6. Turn the chicken after 6 minutes.
7. Sprinkle with remaining fresh dill before serving.
